sequence.action: Run validator on mission, OPORD, task order, SITREP, evidence, and AAR.
sequence.expected_result: All payloads pass schema and semantic validation.

sequence.action: Run policy engine on Green and Red tool requests.
sequence.expected_result: Green request is allowed and Red request is blocked.

sequence.action: Run event replay and dashboard state renderer.
sequence.expected_result: Replay projection and dashboard state remain aligned.

friction_points.issue: Dashboard projection may diverge from event replay if the projection contract changes.
friction_points.mitigation: Stop and patch renderer or saved state before reporting completion.

decision_points: If any validation fails, stop execution and issue SITREP.
If scope requires deployment or credentials, request commander approval before action.
